card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: White House lists dozens of 'hoaxes' pushed by media, critics in Trump's first 100 days
card.description: President Donald Trump's administration shared a list of dozens of purported "hoaxes" about his presidency that have been fact-checked in his first 100 days.

author.description: Official White House Rapid Response account. Supporting @POTUS's America First agenda and holding the Fake News accountable. MAGA!

tweets.text: NEC Director Kevin Hassett: @POTUS doesn't get enough credit for how informed he is on policy and how much he really cares about it.
